articles.title: White House drastically shortens deadline for dropping quantum-vulnerable crypto
articles.content: Order warns of national security risks if post-quantum cryptography isn't adopted in time.
articles.titleZh: 白宫大幅缩短放弃易受量子攻击的加密货币的截止日期
articles.contentZh: 如果未及时采用后量子加密技术，命令将警告国家安全风险。

articles.title: Oracle’s 21,000 layoffs help drive its debt-fueled AI investments
articles.content: Oracle is spending billions on data center infrastructure to support AI.
articles.titleZh: 甲骨文的21,000次裁员有助于推动其以债务为动力的人工智能投资
articles.contentZh: 甲骨文正在花费数十亿美元用于数据中心基础设施，以支持人工智能。

articles.title: Following user outcry, AMD reinstates memory encryption in consumer CPUs
articles.content: Critics saw the move as an underhanded way to steer them toward more costly chips.
articles.titleZh: 在用户强烈抗议后， AMD在消费者CPU中恢复内存加密
articles.contentZh: 批评人士认为，此举是将他们引向更昂贵的芯片的卑鄙方式。

articles.title: Microsoft discovers new lightweight backdoor that steals cryptocurrency
articles.content: Crypto Clipper spreads over USB and communicates over Tor.
articles.titleZh: 微软发现窃取加密货币的新型轻量级后门
articles.contentZh: Crypto Clipper通过USB进行传播，并通过Tor进行通信。

articles.title: The best robot vacuum deals available during Prime Day
articles.content: If you’ve been wanting to buy a robot vacuum but have been put off by how much it can cost to get a good one, now is not a bad time to start looking. Prime Day has kicked off, though more than just Amazon is offering deals on several models we’ve tested from brands like […]
articles.titleZh: Prime Day期间可用的最佳机器人吸尘器优惠
articles.contentZh: 如果您一直想购买机器人吸尘器，但却被购买一台好吸尘器的成本所拖延，那么现在不是开始寻找的好时机。Prime Day已经开始了，尽管不仅仅是亚马逊为我们已经测试过的几款车型提供优惠，例如[…]

articles.title: This year’s Prime Day deals on Apple products are the best I’ve seen
articles.content: Amazon’s Prime Day sale is here, and whether you’re looking for a new pair of wireless earbuds or a smartwatch, there’s a good chance you’ll find a discount. The Apple Watch Series 11 has already dropped to a new low price, while the AirPods Pro 3 recently hit a record-low $169 at Walmart. That particular […]
articles.titleZh: 今年苹果产品的Prime Day优惠是我见过的最好的
articles.contentZh: 亚马逊的Prime Day促销已经到来，无论您是在寻找一副新的无线耳机还是智能手表，您都很有可能会找到折扣。Apple Watch Series 11已经降至新的低价，而AirPods Pro 3最近在沃尔玛创下了169 $的历史新低。那个特别的[…]
